title: Costco India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Costco India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
